production_asset_path.rationale: Package-scoped production consumption avoids unnecessary data/ duplication, preserves provenance, and makes rollback a registry/gate change rather than asset movement.
production_asset_path.rollbackImpact: Assets remain inert after rollback; operational selection is disabled by gate and registry booleans.
production_asset_path.futureCountyImplications: County #3 can follow package-root activation after boundary, registry, containment, validation, and rollback artifacts pass.
